items.title: The Sacramento Kings and Jonathan Mogbo have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Mogbo was the 31st pick of the 2024 NBA Draft and spent the past two seasons with the Toronto Raptors. Agent Austin Walton of NEXT Sports and Kings officials
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Sacramento Kings and Jonathan Mogbo have agreed to a two-way deal, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Mogbo was the 31st pick of the 2024 NBA Draft and spent the past two seasons with the Toronto Raptors. Agent Austin Walton of NEXT Sports and Kings officials agreed to the deal.

items.title: Raptors are declining the team option on Jonathan Mogbo for 2026-27, am told.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Raptors are declining the team option on Jonathan Mogbo for 2026-27, am told.

Roundup:

*Shead, Jackson-Davis options picked up
*Mogbo option declined
*Mamukelashvili declined his option

*Martin RFA qualifying offer

*Hepburn re-signed 2-way deal

*Battle deal guarantees July 1
